title: Fix NPC speed in server tick

log.context: Fix NPC speed in server tick

Done. Here's a summary of what was changed in `/mnt/data/clunger/src/index.ts`:

**Changes made:**

1. **`COMMONS_NPC_SPEED`**: `0.8` → `35` px per tick. At 500ms tick rate that's ~70px/sec, meaning an NPC crosses the 1000px canvas in ~14 seconds — right in the natural walking pace target.

2. **Direction timer reset**: `60 + random(120)` ticks → `8 + random(8)` ticks. Old range was 30–90 seconds between turns; new range is 4–8 seconds. NPCs will walk purposefully for a few seconds then turn, ra...(truncated)
